title: simple french fries
description: a ultra super simple french fry mod cause there is literally no others on Modrinth
body:
Super Simple French fry mod I made in 30 minutes using mcreator (cause I was to lazy to code everything in intelliJ for something so simple/ im not good at coding), I originaly planed to make a addon for farmers delight but ended up not and I like it being a stand alone thing.  really simple all you need to do is take some potatos, paper and red dye and you got yourself some fries honestly not more to say crafting recipes and stuff either use Jei or just look at the gallery section of this page. Note:i am not good at texturing and dont claim to be again I made this quickly so sorry about the textures looking ugly.
